working_on.feature: Employer platform polish + FDIWork public UX refresh
working_on.task: Commit current multi-area changes, save project memory, and push a Vercel preview deployment from a non-production branch
working_on.notes: Worktree currently includes broad employer/admin/public changes. GitNexus detect_changes reports CRITICAL because many files are already changed together, but impact checks run on edited public symbols remained LOW.

pending_tasks.task: Manual QA on preview for employer notification, package assignment, and conditional job deletion flows
Bring job listing, company detail, and remaining public pages onto the same premium visual system as homepage
Document product/design tokens into PRODUCT.md or DESIGN.md so future passes can use impeccable with project-native context

recent_changes.description: Prepared commit + preview deployment workflow for the current combined change set. Decision: use a non-main git branch for Vercel so deploy stays in preview rather than production.

Redesigned FDIWork homepage visual system toward a higher-end VietnamWorks-inspired direction: layered navy shell, warm neutral sections, refined CTA orange usage, tighter card rhythm, improved employer banner, top employers rail, featured jobs, industry cards, and editorial blog cards. Fixed search hook lifecycle warning and validated no overflow at 1440/768/390.

Expanded employer/admin/public flows: safer employer job posting actions, employer notification bell, package assignment/search improvements, shared job taxonomy, import hardening, simplified public apply form, public company/blog route updates, and loading state additions.

errors_encountered.error: React warning: state update on useSearchSuggestions before mount
errors_encountered.solution: Guarded async fetch/finally paths with mountedRef and moved mounted state setup into effect cleanup lifecycle

errors_encountered.error: Homepage redesign initially left low-contrast CTA and uneven section transition visibility
errors_encountered.solution: Changed section surfaces to warm-neutral cards on pale background and promoted top employers CTA to a visible white button

errors_encountered.error: Previous public UI passes left search/header/banner spacing and card density inconsistent
errors_encountered.solution: Normalized rhythm across header, hero, employer banner, top employers, featured jobs, industries, and blog sections

decisions_made.decision: Keep Vercel deployment on a non-main branch
decisions_made.reason: The deploy skill defaults to preview, and pushing master would risk a production deployment for a linked repo

decisions_made.decision: Use a layered navy + warm-neutral palette instead of more saturated blue slabs
decisions_made.reason: This keeps the platform premium and high-contrast without losing action clarity or search-first hierarchy

decisions_made.decision: Preserve functionality while redesigning instead of introducing new frontend dependencies
decisions_made.reason: Current stack already supports the UI goals, and avoiding dependency churn keeps deploy/build risk low

verification.notes: Passed after visual redesign and search hook lifecycle fix

verification.command: npx eslint targeted public UI files + useSearchSuggestions
verification.notes: Validated homepage/public redesign files and hook patch
Viewports 1440x900, 768x1024, 390x844: no horizontal overflow, no console warnings/errors after reload, visible buttons >= 36px
Critical is due to the already-broad dirty worktree spanning employer/admin/public areas, not because the homepage-only edits had high symbol impact
